notableEvents.label: David Fry GIDP
notableEvents.detail: David Fry grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Rhys Hoskins out at 2nd. David Fry out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo homers (5) on a fly ball to left field.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter pops out to third baseman Alec Bohm.

notableEvents.label: Justin Crawford GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford grounds into a double play, second baseman Travis Bazzana to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. J.T. Realmuto out at 2nd. Justin Crawford out at 1st.
